stories.title: 76ers Eliminate Celtics 109-100 in Game 7 — Embiid 34, Maxey 30, Historic 3-1 Comeback Complete

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
EMBIID. MAXEY. PHILADELPHIA.

76ers 109, Celtics 100. GAME 7. TD Garden.

Embiid: 34 PTS. Post-appendectomy. Didn't matter.
Maxey: 30 PTS to close it out.

3-1 deficit. All gone. 76ers are MOVING ON. #HoopHeroes #Sixers

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The 76ers just completed a 3-1 comeback against the Celtics.

In Boston. On their floor. In Game 7.

Embiid played through post-surgery pain. Maxey delivered 30 pts.

Now Philly goes to New York. #HoopHeroes #Sixers

article.headline: 76ers Eliminate Celtics 109-100 in Game 7 — Embiid 34, Maxey 30, Historic 3-1 Comeback Complete

stories.title: Game 7 Today — Pistons Host Magic, 3:30 PM ET on ABC

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
GAME 7. TODAY. 3:30 PM ET. ABC.

Pistons host Magic at Little Caesars Arena.

Cade dropped 32/10 — 19 in the 4th — and came back from 24 DOWN in Orlando.

Now he's home. #HoopHeroes #Pistons

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Detroit was down 3-1. Then down 24 in Game 6.

They won 93-79.

The Magic missed 23 STRAIGHT shots. The Pistons outscored them 55-19 in the 2nd half.

Game 7. At home. Cade is ready. #HoopHeroes #Pistons

article.headline: Pistons vs. Magic Game 7 Preview: Can Cade Finish It at Home After the Most Dramatic Comeback of the Round?

stories.title: Game 7 Tonight — Cavaliers Host Raptors, 7:30 PM ET on NBC

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
GAME 7. TONIGHT. 7:30 PM ET. NBC. Cleveland.

The home team has won EVERY game in this series.

CLE is 8.5-pt favorites. But Toronto has RJ Barrett.

The man who hit a 29-foot OT buzzer beater to stay alive. #HoopHeroes #Raptors

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Raptors storyline going into Game 7:

Road team. No home games to come back to. Facing Mobley + Mitchell at Rocket Mortgage.

And yet — RJ Barrett already made history once this series.

Can he do it again? 7:30 PM ET. #HoopHeroes #Raptors

article.headline: Cavaliers vs. Raptors Game 7 Preview: Home Team Has Won Every Game — Will Cleveland Close It Out Tonight?

stories.title: West Semis Set — No. 1 Thunder vs. No. 4 Lakers, No. 2 Spurs vs. No. 6 Wolves

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The West is LOCKED.

No. 1 Thunder vs. No. 4 Lakers — TUESDAY in OKC
No. 2 Spurs vs. No. 6 Wolves

SGA vs. LeBron. Wembanyama vs. Edwards (if healthy).

Best round of the playoffs. #HoopHeroes

article.headline: West Semis Set: Thunder-Lakers and Spurs-Wolves Deliver Star Power, Drama in Round 2

stories.title: East Semis: 76ers Will Face Knicks — One Spot Still Up for Grabs

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
EAST SEMIS FIRST LOOK:

✅ 76ers vs. Knicks — CONFIRMED
⏳ Pistons/Magic vs. Cavs/Raptors — Game 7s TODAY

Embiid going to Madison Square Garden.

This East bracket might be the best in years. #HoopHeroes

article.headline: 76ers vs. Knicks Is Set — Embiid Heads to MSG in the East's Marquee Second-Round Matchup
